reviews.comment:
Pedí milanesa a la suiza con papas españolas, plato clásico. Si el precio era $360 y estaba bien ok, pero no. Era caro, estaba fría, cortada con láser la carne, no había salsa y las papas súper aceitosas. En mí caso un desastre el restaurante, eso si buena atención y baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
I ordered Swiss-style breaded steak with Spanish potatoes, a classic dish. If the price was $360 and it was good, fine, but no. It was expensive, the meat was cold, it looked like it had been laser-cut, there was no sauce, and the potatoes were incredibly oily. In my case, the restaurant was a disaster, although the service was good and the restrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnOXItYnlnRRAB
